welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn 90,000 Bonus Miles after spending $6,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer ends 7/15/2026.
notes: Official Amex business page is canonical for the public limited-time headline offer: 90,000 Bonus Miles after $6,000 in purchases in the first 6 months; offer ends 7/15/2026.

Delta news/source evidence describes the campaign as a tiered/additional-bonus structure (70,000 base miles plus 20,000 additional miles). Keep this tiered context in review metadata so the offer is not mistaken for an unconditional non-tiered lump-sum source pattern.
No source conflicts observed for the final 90,000-mile public limited-time offer.

welcome_offer: sources/*delta-news*.md:New Delta SkyMiles Gold American Express Card Members can earn 70,000 bonus miles after spending $3,000... plus an additional 20,000 bonus miles after spending an additional $2,000...

open_questions: Confirm the 7/15/2026 expiry remains visible before applying future changes.

community.summary: Official Delta business and news sources are canonical for this public limited-time offer. Third-party sources are supporting only.

observations.excerpt: Delta business sources describe up to 90,000 miles for Gold.
USCCG tracks the same elevated Delta Gold Business offer.
